title: Triggered Status
description: This returns the status/condition of the force trigger.
notes:
This returns the status/condition just prior to the triggering of the force trigger. When the force trigger conditions are met, True is returned. False is returned when not met.

This is used for branch processing when force is used as a condition.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Trigger

TriggerMode Property
examples:
Function TriggeredTest Boolean bVar FCKeep FC1 Till FT1, 10 FGet FT1.Triggered, bVar If bVar = True Then
   'The process when the trigger conditions are met
   - Else
   'The process when the trigger conditions are not met
   - EndIf
Fend
